name: Smart Fetch
description: Clean web content extraction with browser-grade TLS fingerprinting. Uses wreq-js (Rust native bindings) for anti-bot bypass and Defuddle for superior content extraction.

browser.description: Default browser profile for TLS fingerprinting (default: chrome_145)

os.description: Default OS profile for fingerprinting (default: windows)

removeImages.description: Strip image references from output (default: false)

batchConcurrency.description: Maximum number of batch_smart_fetch requests to run concurrently (default: 8)

tempDir.description: Absolute temp directory used for attachment and binary downloads. If omitted, the plugin uses an OS temp subdirectory.
